description_long: This helmet is predominantly white with a weathered, battle-worn appearance, featuring bold red stripes running from front to back along the top and sides. Large red insignias resembling stylized birds or wings are present on both sides, accompanied by yellow and red chevron-like markings and a black circular emblem with radiating lines. The helmet has a prominent, integrated side structure and a tinted, wraparound visor that covers the eyes. The chin area includes a black microphone boom and a visible quick-release buckle strap for securing the helmet. The overall design is reminiscent of a science fiction or aviation theme, with a focus on both protection and distinctive visual identity.
description: A white, weathered helmet with red stripes, large red insignias, a tinted visor, and detailed graphic markings, evoking a sci-fi or aviation style.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the large red insignia, red and yellow chevrons, black circular emblem, and the helmet's side structure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the tinted visor, central red stripe, yellow chevron pattern above the visor, and the chin strap with quick-release buckle.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same red insignia, chevrons, and black emblem, plus the microphone boom visible.
description_view_3: Top view displaying the dual red stripes running the length of the helmet and the symmetrical side structures.
attribute_brand_logo: A large red emblem resembling a stylized bird or wing, located on both sides of the helmet; no commercial brand logo present.
attribute_graphic_design: White base with red stripes, large red winged emblems, yellow and red chevrons, and a black circular motif; weathered, sci-fi inspired design.
